title: Queue lease (atomic claim / lease / reap)
description: The lease a worker holds on a tracker task, as it crosses any API/MCP/backchannel boundary. Semantics (from tasks db.js, which is the single writer): a claim is ONE atomic guarded UPDATE (status todo→doing + claimed_by + claim_token + lease_expires_at) so two workers can never win the same task; the default lease is 30 minutes; reap returns expired 'doing' leases to 'todo' and clears all lease fields; ANY transition out of 'doing' clears the lease. Only the lease holder (claimed_by + claim_token) may report. New in v1: `fence` — lease expiry does not prove the old worker stopped, so every (re)claim increments a per-task monotonic fence and the store MUST reject writes carrying a stale fence (dispatcher-review §4 correction). Top-level schema = the full server-side lease; $defs/leasePublic is the browser-safe projection (claim_token is a capability secret and is scrubbed from anything viewer-bound).

worker.description: Canonical lowercase handle of the claiming agent (tasks column claimed_by). Capability/lane eligibility is looked up server-side in the agents registry, never trusted from the caller.

claim_token.description: SECRET lease capability, minted server-side at claim time (crypto.randomUUID()). Authenticates report/renew/release. MUST never be sent to browsers or logged.

fence.description: Monotonic per-task fencing token, incremented on every successful (re)claim. Every write performed under this lease MUST carry it; the store rejects writes whose fence is below the task's current fence, so a delayed/zombie worker cannot commit after reap+reclaim.

granted_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — when this claim won.

lease_expires_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC — after this instant the lease is reapable (doing→todo, lease fields cleared). Canonical wire form is RFC 3339 even though the SQLite store keeps 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS' UTC internally.

lease_seconds.description: Lease duration granted; renewals extend lease_expires_at by this much.

leasePublic.description: Viewer-safe projection: everything except claim_token (knowing worker/expiry enables no action without the token; the cockpit uses them for swimlanes and lease countdowns).
